title: Passionate Pursuit in Wakuwaku Space-time - Warriors of Love, Begin a New Journey!
overview: Da Cider brings Lamune a new quest, one of the highest importance! The trouble is, Milk and Lesca find out about it too.

title: Passionate Pursuit in Wakuwaku Space-time - Warriors of Love, Travel to the Past!
overview: After the time-space explosion, the group finds themselves three years in the past. Surely more explosions will fix the problem though!

title: Passionate Pursuit in Wakuwaku Space-time - Warriors of Love, Be Eternal!
overview: Returning to their normal time, Lamune and Da Cider finally complete their quest. But all that glitters may not be Gold or Silver!
